hero.title: Entrust your children with complete peace of mind, anywhere in Tunisia.
hero.subtitle: Confi'Sit connects parents and trusted babysitters with clear profiles, transparent reviews, and a mobile-first experience.

whoWeAre.title: Our mission: connect families with trusted babysitters.
whoWeAre.description1: Confi'Sit supports parents and babysitters with a focus on security, simplicity, and proximity. We offer a modern and reassuring service to organize peaceful care, throughout Tunisia.
whoWeAre.description2: Our vision is to create a local community where every parent finds the right support for their child and every babysitter builds a trusting relationship with families.

howItWorks.title: A simple and reassuring experience for Tunisian parents.

whyChoose.title: Why choose Confi'Sit?
whyChoose.description: We carefully select trusted babysitters, with clear profiles and a simple interface to organize your care with complete peace of mind.
whyChoose.point1: A network of babysitters covering all neighborhoods of Tunis and its suburbs.
whyChoose.point2: Precise search criteria to quickly identify the right profile for your needs.
whyChoose.point3: A modern, secure platform accessible on all your devices.

step1.title: 1. Discover reliable profiles
step1.description: Browse available babysitters with reviews, rates, and detailed skills.

step2.title: 2. Filter according to your needs
step2.description: Choose by neighborhood, availability, rate or experience in a few clicks.

step3.title: 3. Contact and confirm
step3.description: Send a request directly from the profile and organize the care with complete confidence.

step4.title: 4. Share your feedback
step4.description: Leave a review to help other parents choose the right babysitter.

search.title: Find the perfect babysitter near you.

noResults.title: No babysitter matches your criteria.
noResults.description: Try expanding your search or reducing filters.

booking.title: Easy booking
booking.description: Choose a date, a time slot, and communicate transparently with the babysitter.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q2: No external login required for this demo.
faq.q3: The structure is ready to integrate a backend later.

login.title: Login to Confi'Sit
login.description: Access your parent or babysitter space to manage your searches, requests, and profiles with complete simplicity.
login.errorNoAccount: No account found for this email.

signup.title: Join Confi'Sit as a parent or babysitter.
signup.subtitle: Choose your profile to see the right form.
signup.roleParentHelp: Create an account to publish your requests and browse reliable profiles.
signup.roleBabysitterHelp: Join the community and find families near you.
signup.formDescription: Complete the form to finalize your account.

fields.name: Full name
fields.emailError: This email is already in use, login or use another email.
fields.passwordError: Password must be at least 8 characters.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: If an account exists with this email, a reset link will be sent.

member.description: Your Confi'Sit space is ready. Discover trusted babysitters and manage your requests from your dashboard.

footer.title: Confi'Sit
footer.description: A Tunisian service connecting parents and trusted babysitters, designed for your family's peace of mind.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Confi'Sit. Created with care for Tunisian families.
